title: Achieving Optimal
description: Joshua Hurwitz is the founder of Good News Health and Wellness Solutions, LLC and a health and wellness coach for men and women aged 40+ who are seeking to live more active, healthy and purposeful liv
longDescription: Joshua Hurwitz is the founder of Good News Health and Wellness Solutions, LLC and a health and wellness coach for men and women aged 40+ who are seeking to live more active, healthy and purposeful lives. Born and raised in New Orleans, Louisiana, and having personally prioritized living a healthy lifestyle for more than 42 years, Joshua now spends his time pursuing his passion of helping men and women over age 40 to discover active, healthy and purposeful living for themselves. He is 57 years old, a proud father of two sons, 25 and 22, enjoys snow skiing, weight lifting, attending rock concerts, traveling, playing golf, his guitar and spending time with the people he loves. His greatest work passion is educating men and women aged 40+ on the benefits of properly administered hormone optimization, for which he has received certification from one of the most recognized progressive physicians in the field. Joshua still resides in his home town of New Orleans, where he takes care of his father and operates his virtual health and wellness coaching business. Good News Health and Wellness Solutions, LLC: goodnewshealthandwellnesssolutions.com/claim-page Connect with Eric's ADHD Experience on Social: 🔴Follow on Spotify: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/erics-adhd-experience 🔵Follow on Facebook: Facebook.com/ericsadhdexperience 🔵Follow on Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com/@erics_adhd_experience 🔴Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ericsadhdexperience/

title: Renegade
description: Theophile Bourgeois is an Artist, Musician and a native son of Southeast Louisiana. As owner of The Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge, frontman for Southern Soul Rock & Roll band Them Ol’ Ghosts, and a Tattoo
longDescription: Theophile Bourgeois is an Artist, Musician and a native son of Southeast Louisiana. As owner of The Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge, frontman for Southern Soul Rock & Roll band Them Ol’ Ghosts, and a Tattooer for nearly 20 years- Bourgeois is a true Cajun Renaissance man. His new film series Renegade dives into the crossroads of his creative pursuits and his passion for the outdoors and tells the stories of the unique people he meets along the way. title: Trippy Shrooms Part II
description: Born in San Diego, Vincent spent most of his life in the South. After graduating from military school in 95, he immediately started a career on industrial boats and spent 20+ years from deckhand at th
longDescription: Born in San Diego, Vincent spent most of his life in the South. After graduating from military school in 95, he immediately started a career on industrial boats and spent 20+ years from deckhand at the age of 18 to captain at 39 when he changed careers. After a shooting incident at his home and the resulting aftermath of having his son be suspected, and subsequently arrested and charged with attempted murder, Vincent suffered PTSD. So began a lengthy course of destructive behavior so intense he was invited to enter in a psilocybin treatment study at Johns Hopkins Center for Consciousness Studies in order to be treated with psilocybin. That treatment changed everything and he became so grateful to the change, he dedicated himself to bringing that same treatment to others. Since then Vincent has spent the last 6 years in the mushroom business refusing to return to the waters he was familiar navigating. He started growing laboratory strains, to hunting and farming wild ones outdoors. He spent two years studying shamanism and plant medicine in Northern Alaska and then to Las Vegas to openly provide on the streets as his own mobile pop-up shop. Now he resides in New Orleans, in the hopes to bring the healing powers of all medicinal plants to the open market. title: Trippy Shrooms Part I
description: Born in San Diego, Vincent spent most of his life in the South. After graduating from military school in 95, he immediately started a career on industrial boats and spent 20+ years from deckhand at th
longDescription: Born in San Diego, Vincent spent most of his life in the South. After graduating from military school in 95, he immediately started a career on industrial boats and spent 20+ years from deckhand at the age of 18 to captain at 39 when he changed careers. After a shooting incident at his home and the resulting aftermath of having his son be suspected, and subsequently arrested and charged with attempted murder, Vincent suffered PTSD. So began a lengthy course of destructive behavior so intense he was invited to enter in a psilocybin treatment study at Johns Hopkins Center for Consciousness Studies in order to be treated with psilocybin. That treatment changed everything and he became so grateful to the change, he dedicated himself to bringing that same treatment to others. Since then Vincent has spent the last 6 years in the mushroom business refusing to return to the waters he was familiar navigating. He started growing laboratory strains, to hunting and farming wild ones outdoors. He spent two years studying shamanism and plant medicine in Northern Alaska and then to Las Vegas to openly provide on the streets as his own mobile pop-up shop. Now he resides in New Orleans, in the hopes to bring the healing powers of all medicinal plants to the open market.

title: Juice'd
description: After years of working in the medical field, and through my own personal journey with hormonal imbalances, I witnessed the transformative power that these therapies can have on one’s overall well-bein
longDescription: After years of working in the medical field, and through my own personal journey with hormonal imbalances, I witnessed the transformative power that these therapies can have on one’s overall well-being. Driven by this realization, I embarked on a journey to create a space that blends medical expertise with a comfortable environment. The process involved meticulous research, assembling a team of skilled professionals, and carefully curating a range of cutting-edge treatments. Each step was fueled by the desire to offer clients a safe space where they could achieve their wellness goals under the care of experienced hands. Today, Oak House Med Spa stands as a testament to the new and integrative concierge health medicine, and a place where I am honored to guide clients towards a path of self-assurance and optimal health.

title: Authentic Self
description: In this episode of Eric's ADHD Experience, join host Eric as he sits down with special guest Dillon King. Dillon is a remarkable individual, wearing many hats in his life. From being a devoted family
longDescription: In this episode of Eric's ADHD Experience, join host Eric as he sits down with special guest Dillon King. Dillon is a remarkable individual, wearing many hats in his life. From being a devoted family man to an entrepreneur, coach, and advocate, Dillon is passionate about empowering others to live their best lives while embracing their authentic selves. If you're seeking inspiration from a captivating rags-to-riches story, this episode is a must-listen. Join Eric and Dillon as they delve into personal experiences, share valuable insights, and explore the journey of self-discovery. Get ready for an uplifting and empowering conversation that will leave you motivated to embrace your true potential.

title: The Beast
description: Eric's ADHD Experience Presents: Unlocking Your Inner Wisdom. Shawn Oddo's Journey to Building a Fitness Empire with Valhalla Training Grounds. Get ready for an electrifying episode of Eric's ADHD Exp
longDescription: Eric's ADHD Experience Presents: Unlocking Your Inner Wisdom. Shawn Oddo's Journey to Building a Fitness Empire with Valhalla Training Grounds. Get ready for an electrifying episode of Eric's ADHD Experience podcast as we sit down with the unstoppable Shawn Oddo, owner, and operator of Valhalla Training Grounds – the first private, hard-core, 24-hour facility in Louisiana. Hailing from Metairie, Shawn has been a competitive bodybuilder and a key player in the fitness industry for 21 years. In this riveting conversation, we explore Shawn's journey from developing a vision to bringing it to life by opening Valhalla five years ago. Recently, he expanded the business by moving to a bigger location, showcasing his unwavering commitment to building his fitness empire and helping people achieve goals they never thought possible. We discuss the mentality, values, and traits needed to continually grow in life, both inside and outside the gym. Tune in to Eric's ADHD Experience podcast to be inspired by Shawn Oddo's remarkable story of perseverance, passion, and dedication to the fitness world. You'll be motivated by his drive to create a lasting impact on people's lives through physical transformation and personal growth.

title: Tappen' into the Endangered Mind
description: Veteran paramedic, and former actor, Jon McCarthy, became a published author with the release of his 2017 nonfiction memoir, Hard Roll: A Paramedic’s Perspective of Life and Death in New Orleans. He t
longDescription: Veteran paramedic, and former actor, Jon McCarthy, became a published author with the release of his 2017 nonfiction memoir, Hard Roll: A Paramedic’s Perspective of Life and Death in New Orleans. He transitioned to a published comic creator with the release of his comic series, Endangered. He currently has a series of horror comics slated for release in the second half of 2023.

title: Soul'd Out With Jourdan Blue
description: What’s up! My name is Jourdan Blue and I’m a creative based in New Orleans, Louisiana. I started my music journey about 2 years ago, following my appearance on American Idol in 2021. I hope to spread
longDescription: What’s up! My name is Jourdan Blue and I’m a creative based in New Orleans, Louisiana. I started my music journey about 2 years ago, following my appearance on American Idol in 2021. I hope to spread love and positivity through my music and help people to feel seen and heard.

title: Mind, Body, Spirit
description: Steve Schulkens is an award-winning television producer and public relations executive, but he also spends a good portion of his time sponsoring and mentoring others. A native of New Orleans and forme
longDescription: Steve Schulkens is an award-winning television producer and public relations executive, but he also spends a good portion of his time sponsoring and mentoring others. A native of New Orleans and former TV and Radio news reporter, Steve is the sponsor of ADHD Experience Host Eric Falgout as well as many others in various 12 step programs. He is involved with recovery and spiritual retreats that help others “die to the old self” as he did and continues to do, and become “born anew,” as he says is a daily occurrence for him. Steve is a big fan of many spiritual gurus and authors including Father Anthony Demello, the late Catholic priest from India who wrote “Awareness,” and “Rediscovering Life”-two books which led to Steve’s spiritual awakening.

title: Crisis
description: My name is Ashley Morrison. Born and raised in Marrero, Louisiana. I’ve been a Paramedic with West Jefferson EMS for 16 years. I started my career there as a EMT-Basic, professed to become a Paramedic
longDescription: My name is Ashley Morrison. Born and raised in Marrero, Louisiana. I’ve been a Paramedic with West Jefferson EMS for 16 years. I started my career there as a EMT-Basic, professed to become a Paramedic. Earning my way to a field supervisor. Serving the community is my passion. I was a Flight Paramedic for about 18 months during that time frame, which was my dream job and humbling to be able to have experienced and gain knowledge. I am also a mother of a recent high school graduate.

title: Jude Blued Rabbit Hole of Randomness
description: On this week's episode of Eric's ADHD Experience, we dive deep down the rabbit hole of randomness with our special guest, Jude Blued! Jude resides in the greater New Orleans area and has built a caree
longDescription: On this week's episode of Eric's ADHD Experience, we dive deep down the rabbit hole of randomness with our special guest, Jude Blued! Jude resides in the greater New Orleans area and has built a career of over 50 years in radio broadcasting. Join us and listen to his enlightening perspective on the world, as he shares his life stories and latest endeavors in the world of comedy. #comedy #neworleans #podcast

title: A Doc's Game
description: In this episode, we are thrilled to have Dr. Ryan Estaris as our guest. Ryan is a Texas-born medical doctor raised in the greater New Orleans area. He's not only an accomplished physician but also a r
longDescription: In this episode, we are thrilled to have Dr. Ryan Estaris as our guest. Ryan is a Texas-born medical doctor raised in the greater New Orleans area. He's not only an accomplished physician but also a renowned public speaker who has harnessed his ADHD to achieve success in many ventures. Discover how he's transformed his attention deficit into a powerful tool, enabling him to excel in his career while making a positive impact on others' lives.

title: Making Calm of The Most Extreme
description: Join us as we explore the inspiring journey of Coty Ziegler, a New Orleans native and mixed martial artist with 10+ years of boxing experience. As a former BFC lightweight champion, he's now gearing u
longDescription: Join us as we explore the inspiring journey of Coty Ziegler, a New Orleans native and mixed martial artist with 10+ years of boxing experience. As a former BFC lightweight champion, he's now gearing up for his professional debut! Discover the grit, resilience, and determination it takes to pursue your dreams in the world of combat sports.

title: Words From Experience
description: Gary L. Kreigh is one of AIA Publishing’s exciting new voices in the literary field. His sensitivity to modern issues illuminates his work. Born in Anderson, Indiana, Gary Kreigh graduated with an acc
longDescription: Gary L. Kreigh is one of AIA Publishing’s exciting new voices in the literary field. His sensitivity to modern issues illuminates his work. Born in Anderson, Indiana, Gary Kreigh graduated with an accounting degree from Ball State University. He also studied at the University of Indianapolis for Computer Technology and the Gonzaga University for Organizational Development. Gary uses his thirty-five years in the fields of forensic accounting, fraud examination, and internal auditing to write about corporate and social issues, and experiences that affect ordinary people in extraordinary situations. His experience spans the banking, retail, finance, education, and medical industries. He now juggles his time and residence between New Orleans and Gulf Shores, Alabama. His first book, Why Birds Fall, is a mystery about corruption in the aviation industry. His second Masquerade of Truth is a murder mystery full of colourful characters set in New Orleans.

title: Fighting Spirit
description: Mac McCall aka Coach Mac serves his life purpose as an Entrepreneur, Coach, Actor and Community Activist. Mac has developed his Full Spectrum Health System which includes a Mind, Body, Spirit approach
longDescription: Mac McCall aka Coach Mac serves his life purpose as an Entrepreneur, Coach, Actor and Community Activist. Mac has developed his Full Spectrum Health System which includes a Mind, Body, Spirit approach to health and wellness. He has used this system to overcome addiction and sexual abuse. He has dedicated his life to healing others by showing the world that you can overcome any trauma. You can turn PAIN into POWER. Today, he is here to talk about his Non Profit Foundation Lion Heart Community and the Lion Cubs program. He intends on changing the course of New Orleans through a Mind, Body, Spirit approach. Mac believes social change is through the people. We can heal the whole world by healing our inner world.

title: Be a Man, Get Over It
description: Guest Lou JD speaks on MensMental Health. Lou JD gives hindsight and speaks on what isn’t spoken in most men these days. Talks about how we aren’t able to express our feelings of emotion or problems b
longDescription: Guest Lou JD speaks on MensMental Health. Lou JD gives hindsight and speaks on what isn’t spoken in most men these days. Talks about how we aren’t able to express our feelings of emotion or problems because we are seen as a “weak man”. Rather it be career traumatic events, relationships, or family. Men are always taught to bottle it up until we become mentally broken. One of Lou’s purposes is to bring more awareness on the unspoken, men’s mental health. Help reduce the male suicide rate even if it’s 1 person at a time. This is just the beginning and feel like we are only scratching the surface of this male stigma and ultimately the “silent killer” in 80% of men.

title: T-Talk With Tyler
description: Born and raised in southern Louisiana, 22 year old Cosmetologist Tyler Lindner joins us this week and shares some insight on her life as a trans woman of her generation and how her story has affected
longDescription: Born and raised in southern Louisiana, 22 year old Cosmetologist Tyler Lindner joins us this week and shares some insight on her life as a trans woman of her generation and how her story has affected who she is today. By sharing her opinions and experiences she hopes to help others in her community, and spread awareness to others outside of the LGBTQ+ community struggling to understand what it means to be Transgender.

title: Diverse Intellect
description: Anthony "The Freak" Johnson was born in New Orleans, Louisiana. Johnson attended O. Perry Walker High School, where he was a four-time all-district selection, 4 time All State Selection, and 4 time De
longDescription: Anthony "The Freak" Johnson was born in New Orleans, Louisiana. Johnson attended O. Perry Walker High School, where he was a four-time all-district selection, 4 time All State Selection, and 4 time Defensive Player of the Year. He broke the Louisiana career sack record with 67.5 sacks during his four-year career, and surpassed Elvis Dumervil. His is the time sack leader with 79 sacks. With 7 NFL seasons including a Super-Bowl with New England and several other accolades under his belt, Johnson is ready to start a new chapter. Music, acting; we don’t know what’s next.

title: House Party
description: In this last and final original episode I threw the last podcast party at my home. Also celebrating my birthday with it. I finally got most of the people in my circle sitting at the same table to talk
longDescription: In this last and final original episode I threw the last podcast party at my home. Also celebrating my birthday with it. I finally got most of the people in my circle sitting at the same table to talk about their amazing ideas and where they’re at right now. This episode is very special because it is the last original episode in the original studio.

longDescription: Episode 24 is one of three original episodes, filmed at our original studio. In this episode I catch up with two of my life songs, playlist, Brian Herman, and Edwin Brito. longDescription: Shawn Oddo is the owner and operator of Valhalla Training Grounds, the first private, hard-core, 24 hour facility in the state. description: Brandon Hutchinson of Belle Chasse, LA is the Founder and Owner of New Orleans’s Premier Esports and Gaming Organization, NOLA FLIGHT. Brandon is currently serving in the Military in the Intelligence
longDescription: Brandon Hutchinson of Belle Chasse, LA is the Founder and Owner of New Orleans’s Premier Esports and Gaming Organization, NOLA FLIGHT. Brandon is currently serving in the Military in the Intelligence Field and received his AA in Music Business Management from Delgado CC in New Orleans also while coaching travel baseball in the region. Brandon has since utilized his Military Background and transitioned his love for Music Production, Artist Management, Sports Management, and Coaching into running a blossoming Pro-Am Esports Team representing the state of Louisiana.

In this episode we discuss how she used this spiritual law to change her life and become a successful entrepreneur and full time content creator. My website is Vibecheqshop.com

longDescription: Neutral Ground Farms. Started in July of 2021, the first indoor CBD grow in the Greater New Orleans area. CEO - Christopher Miller, CFO - Derek Fossier, Master Grower - Joshua Behlar, Grow Design - Kody Tassin, Photography - Mason Gordon, Branding - Ben Bologna. We are a group of cannabis loving enthusiasts who have all collaborated together to bring the Finest Quality Indoor CBD to the south and put Louisiana on the map!

title: Hot Worx

longDescription: Jacob was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's been a Production Operator for Shell Oil for over 14 years. He's also the owner operator of a HOTWORX Studio in Metairie, LA. He's overcome many obstacles in his life. He's an entrepreneur and an amazing philosopher. I've learned so much from Jacob over our years of friendship. Truly inspiring in so many ways. He's a free spirited, soul searching human. Hopefully his story will give others hope.

description: Rayshawn and I have been friends since we were 7 years old. He's the father of three children and husband to Dalieth Adams. Rayshawn is the Founder of the clothing brand Clevr Breed. From life struggl
longDescription: Rayshawn and I have been friends since we were 7 years old. He's the father of three children and husband to Dalieth Adams. Rayshawn is the Founder of the clothing brand Clevr Breed. From life struggles and overcoming adversity. We vibed out hard on this one. Hope you get something out of it.

title: Conspiracy Cowboy
description: Glen Smith was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's lived a very interesting life. His wife was brutally murdered over 20 years ago. Leaving him to raise two daughters on his own without a m
longDescription: Glen Smith was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's lived a very interesting life. His wife was brutally murdered over 20 years ago. Leaving him to raise two daughters on his own without a mother. He's a successful business owner and recovering addict. His story is unlike anything I've ever heard. From selling and being addicted to drugs, dealing with the Cartel all while living a normal life.

title: Oxytocin
description: Ashley is former pageant girl who went from censoring her entire personality due to pageant life, to ironically creating “The Girls Room”, a completely uncensored podcast. Victoria uses her life’s tra
longDescription: Ashley is former pageant girl who went from censoring her entire personality due to pageant life, to ironically creating “The Girls Room”, a completely uncensored podcast. Victoria uses her life’s trauma as a storytelling tool to heal the masses. Never one to skip a hot topic, she will go deep in conversation and philosophy to question the status quo — always adding a spicy take. “The Girls Room” focuses on being the ultimate girls’ girl, a safe haven meant to express all opinions without holding back.

title: Over The Top
description: Kyle grew up in Marrero, LA and spent most of my time between there. He's a member of Team LA Savage Arms. A father of two great kids Married to an amazing woman. He's a mechanic at Extreme Nitrogen.
longDescription: Kyle grew up in Marrero, LA and spent most of my time between there. He's a member of Team LA Savage Arms. A father of two great kids Married to an amazing woman. He's a mechanic at Extreme Nitrogen. His hobbies include arm wrestling, hunting ,fishing,coaching ball with the kids, and anything outdoors.

title: Weight Loss Journey
description: Mikey Ricks is from Harahan, Louisiana. Current LSU student, working at OPT & as a vdeographer & photographer for my personal work. 21 years old. Total loss of 65 lbs.
longDescription: Mikey Ricks is from Harahan, Louisiana. Current LSU student, working at OPT & as a vdeographer & photographer for my personal work. 21 years old. Total loss of 65 lbs.

title: You're Not Special
description: David Theriot, 34, owner of Chomp NOLA Meal Prep, Scorch60 Fitness Brand, Riot Training Systems, and Vanguard Fitness.
longDescription: David Theriot, 34, owner of Chomp NOLA Meal Prep, Scorch60 Fitness Brand, Riot Training Systems, and Vanguard Fitness.

title: NOLA Flight E-Sports Take Off
description: Brandon Hutchinson of Belle Chasse, LA is the Founder and Owner of New Orleans’s Premier Esports and Gaming Organization, NOLA FLIGHT. Brandon is currently serving in the Military in the Intelligence
longDescription: Brandon Hutchinson of Belle Chasse, LA is the Founder and Owner of New Orleans’s Premier Esports and Gaming Organization, NOLA FLIGHT. Brandon is currently serving in the Military in the Intelligence Field and received his AA in Music Business Management from Delgado CC in New Orleans also while coaching travel baseball in the region. Brandon has since utilized his Military Background and transitioned his love for Music Production, Artist Management, Sports Management, and Coaching into running a blossoming Pro-Am Esports Team representing the state of Louisiana.

title: Law Abiding Citizen
description: Yes. I’m from Baton Rouge. I’ve lived around Houston, Guadalajara , Puerto Vallarta, Venice Beach and Palm Springs, California, Oklahoma City, and now New Orleans. I had an award winning Salon in Bato
longDescription: Yes. I’m from Baton Rouge. I’ve lived around Houston, Guadalajara , Puerto Vallarta, Venice Beach and Palm Springs, California, Oklahoma City, and now New Orleans. I had an award winning Salon in Baton Rouge until 2000. I was a color educator and design team member for 8 years with an Italian color line. I’ve been a free lance stylist since 1996 and I’ve recently ran for City Council In New Orleans where I’ve lived going on 6 years. If he’s I retested I just got out of an almost 5 year relationship with the biggest Narcissist in History lol.

title: The Plug
description: On this Episode We talk about Life with Alex Reyes and Tyler Mulkey. We talk about life and everything else in between.
longDescription: On this Episode We talk about Life with Alex Reyes and Tyler Mulkey. We talk about life and everything else in between.

title: Broadway Superstar
description: New Orleans reeled Tommy Capps back home after a career in entertainment and event management in New York and Los Angeles. Broadway production was his niche. The bigger the stars, the bigger the shows
longDescription: New Orleans reeled Tommy Capps back home after a career in entertainment and event management in New York and Los Angeles. Broadway production was his niche. The bigger the stars, the bigger the shows, the more he was right there in his comfort zone.

title: Wonder Woman
description: Ashley was born an raised in Metairie, LA. She's lived a few different lives over the years. From modeling in New York to working in one of the top salons as a Cosmetologist. She spent over a decade w
longDescription: Ashley was born an raised in Metairie, LA. She's lived a few different lives over the years. From modeling in New York to working in one of the top salons as a Cosmetologist. She spent over a decade working in bars and hospitality to fund her dream. These journeys led her to open her own business in 2018 called Novel Design. Over the pandemic she utilized recycled glass from her years of tending bar to create another business called Novel Candles. She pivoted the candle making business in order to keep her design business afloat during the hard times of the pandemic. Her story inspired me in so many ways. She is truly a self made boss and I'm grateful to call her my friend. I hope she inspires you too.

title: Triple Threat
description: Guest-Rayshawn Adams, Cohost - Alexander Reyes - Rayshawn and I have been friends since we were 7 years old. He's the father of three children and husband to Dalieth Adams. Rayshawn is the Founder of
longDescription: Guest-Rayshawn Adams, Cohost - Alexander Reyes - Rayshawn and I have been friends since we were 7 years old. He's the father of three children and husband to Dalieth Adams. Rayshawn is the Founder of the clothing brand Clevr Breed. Alexander is my cohost on this episode. Alex and I have been friends for over 14 years. He is the idea of where the ADHD Experience came from. Rayshawn, Alex, and myself switch things up in this episode. From life struggles and overcoming adversity. We vibed out hard on this one. Hope you get something out of it.

title: Love Language
description: Jacob was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's been a Production Operator for Shell Oil for over 14 years. He's also the owner operator of a HOTWORX Studio in Metairie, LA. He's overcome man
longDescription: Jacob was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's been a Production Operator for Shell Oil for over 14 years. He's also the owner operator of a HOTWORX Studio in Metairie, LA. He's overcome many obstacles in his life. He's an entrepreneur and an amazing philosopher. I've learned so much from Jacob over our years of friendship. Truly inspiring in so many ways. He's a free spirited, soul searching human. Hopefully his story will give others hope.

title: Quaalude Cowboy
description: Glen Smith was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's lived a very interesting life. His wife was brutally murdered over 20 years ago. Leaving him to raise two daughters on his own without a m
longDescription: Glen Smith was born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana. He's lived a very interesting life. His wife was brutally murdered over 20 years ago. Leaving him to raise two daughters on his own without a mother. He's a successful business owner and recovering addict. His story is unlike anything I've ever heard. From selling and being addicted to drugs, dealing with the Cartel all while living a normal life. This first episode is one for the times.
